programme.title: Bells of San Angelo
programme.desc: Bells of San Angelo

programme.title: Man of the Forest
programme.desc: The kidnapping of an heir to a ranch goes awry when the Man of the Forest mistrusted by the heiress takes matters into his own hands with the help of his pet cougar

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: The Boy Who Could Fly
programme.desc: Kindly adolescent Milly Lucy Deakins moves in next door to autistic teen Eric Gibb Jay Underwood The mute Eric whose parents were killed when he was 5 years old lives with his hard-drinking uncle Hugo Fred Gwynne and is obsessed with birds His tendency to stand on rooftops and window ledges posed as if hes flying alarms his social workers but when Eric saves Milly from a potentially deadly fall she begins to believe that the boy really can take flight

programme.title: 20000 Leagues Under the Sea
programme.desc: In the 19th century an expert marine biologist is hired by the government to determine whats sinking ships all over the ocean His daughter follows him They are intercepted by a mysterious captain Nemo and his incredible submarine

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While working as a delivery driver Kimble rescues a man and a woman from the wreckage of a small airplane All three have a problem the man is a politician the woman is not his wife and Kimble doesnt want publicity as the rescuer

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Two prospectors one of whom is at times violently paranoid about being cheated ask Nelson to join them in a search for uranium deposits in a river bottom When after two futile weeks Nelson finally has a positive reading on his Geiger counter the paranoid partner snaps and lets his suspicions get the better of him

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: To fund research for an ocean plants into food products project Nelson agrees to travel to Puerto BlancoSouth America There he teaches skin diving to a thrill seeking millionaire hunter and his wife The boorish hunter wants to kill a large shark and a giant squid for his trophy case An accident quickly matures the man

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Helping the 918th to use weather patterns to bomb an attractive meteorologist captain becomes rebellious when her weather plane is shot down

programme.title: Dark 389
programme.desc: Dark 389

programme.title: Dark 303
programme.desc: Dark 303

programme.title: Dark 311
programme.desc: Dark 311

programme.title: Dark 273
programme.desc: Dark 273

programme.title: The Carson City Kid
programme.desc: The Carson City Kid Roy Rogers stops stagecoaches traveling between Wild West mining towns searching their mail sacks for letters addressed to Morgan Reynolds the man who killed his brother Discovering that Reynolds operates a saloon under the name Lee Jessup Bob Steele the Kid takes a job as the saloons bouncer While vying with Reynolds for the affections of singer Joby Madison Pauline Moore the Kid discovers a swindled miner Noah Beery Jr who claims to be the Carson City Kid

programme.title: Round up Time in Texas
programme.desc: Gene and Frog arrive with a herd of horses for Genes brother a diamond prospector whose work has attracted the interest of a bunch of bad guys

programme.title: Trail Street
programme.desc: Bat Mastersons old friend Billy Burns convinces him to become marshal of Liberal Kansas and help the residents fight drought and a destructive range war

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A recent widow comes to the realization that her late husband purchased a winning lottery ticket so she goes to great lengths to recover it -- and keep the winnings for herself Meanwhile a grave digger resorts to blackmail to land the woman of his dreams

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A good natured vampire takes a more novel approach to satisfying his blood lust with his chosen undercover employment

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Painter Jack Craig gains himself a wealthy patron when he sells a morbid painting He soon finds that in order to please his patron he must continue to paint pictures of death - and this leads him down a murderous path

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: In this black comedy desperate real estate salesman Jake McElhaney tries to convince a magicians strange attractive twin daughters Frances and Priscilla Packard to sell their house

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome audio engineer Eric Dunlap hired to install his strange top notch sound system with a mind of its own for an egotistical music conductor Kurt Hoffman but falls hard for Hoffmans beautiful neglected wife Veronica

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick investigates the murder of a sleazy journalist who was in the process of blackmailing a mayoral candidate

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Two cousins Ryan Dallion and Micki Foster inherit an antiques shop from their uncle Together with his partner they must track down cursed objects that their devil-worshiping uncle had created The first object is a demonic killer doll

programme.title: Theater of Blood
programme.desc: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A high school track star haunted by the recent death of her Olympic-medalist mother is given her mothers magic crystal amulet which brings to life her secret ambitions and extracts vengeance upon those who cause her pain

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The pilot episode that tells the tale of a tiny ship which set off on a three-hour tour but got caught in a storm and beached on an island The pilot was filmed in November 1963 and not aired until almost 30 years later

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa decides to turn the tables after a fast-talking shooting gallery proprietor hustles Little Luke out of 14 in proceeds from the sale of church social tickets

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys expect company Kates pickle-brained ex-beau and his wife

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: The Hi-Ballers under new leader Riker are relentless in their pursuit of BJ and the Piston Packin Mamas especially after word gets out that BJ Snow White and the lady truckers are hauling truckloads of money for the Treasury Dept

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Theres a noisy new neighbor in the hood and her name is Zsa Zsa

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carols dad comes to visit for the first time and Mister Ed has a hot date so he visits the local car wash to get a good shower

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: During an operation to send out twenty Allied soldiers two of them attempt an early escape and are nearly captured

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan talks Klink into building an officers club whereby a boat can be built to sail away with an escaped British POW and the German gunsight he snagged while escaping

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When a Photographer with an attitude is assigned to the 73 Crew McHale and The Boys must work up a plan to get rid of her

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Ashamed of his desk job Binghamton assumes command of the 73 during McHales absence and takes it out on a combat mission so that he can have a war story to share with his battle-hardened fellow Officers

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A mix-up leads Carter to believe Gomers dying

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers grandpa offers pointers on drilling a platoon

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and the Skipper construct a raft and set out to sea to find help Back on the island the remaining castaways are worried about possible headhunters

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: Fortress

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Hong 108
programme.desc: Hong 108

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Hercules 203
programme.desc: Hercules 203

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A group posing as volunteers attacks using a stolen skrill prototype that does not require an implant to control It is discovered that the skrill queen is also missing The investigation leads to a resistance group called Black Wednesday

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: When an alien weapon intended to kill humans via computer systems backfires its creator Kemo is maimed in the process and then sentenced to death for his incompetence Having developed human emotions as a result of his accident Kemo teams with Kincaid to destroy the weapon

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A scientist from Alec Hollands past is employed by a businessman who claims he wants to build a recycling plant near the swamp

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Will starts dating a girl from a carnival Her boss who is manipulating the young carnies wants to sacrifice Will to the forces of darkness in a scam to keep his young work force in line

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Maintenance technician Ted Clifford is possessed by an eerie yellow glow which ultimately kills him It transpires that it is coming from a planet called Triton which captures the Alphans and insists that Helena should become the Eyes of Triton Before long she is acting just as Ted Clifford did before his death

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke help family friend Mary Kaye Porter elude a crime boss whos after the 100000 trust fund for Mary Kayes unborn child

programme.title: Young 219
programme.desc: Young 219

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: An old college friend of Steves is now a father - and part of a vigilante group fed up with the rampant crime in their neighborhood Their latest crackdown however leaves a police informer dead

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Jack Cole was arrested and imprisoned for stealing art treasures of a Latin nation The mission for Phelps and the IM team is to get the objects back But that wont be easy Coles being tortured by the colonel who heads the prison -- and the colonels a traitor who wants the treasure for himself The IMF plans calls for playing the 2 men each deadly off each other

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man signs up people to a magazine subscription showing them his Congressional Medal of Honor to prove his honesty However it is a scam as there is no magazine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working out of the juvenile division when they get called to a movie theater to investigate an attack on a high school student who had acid thrown on his back The suspect is another boy named Gerald Paulson who is emotionally disturbed Later Gerald has an argument with his stepfather and runs out of the house carrying a live hand grenade Eventually Friday and Gannon trail him to a house where a girl he attends high school with is throwing a party and he is holding them hostage and threatening to pull the pin It is now up to the two detectives to get the grenade out of his hands before he kills himself and seriously wounds several other people

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is befriended by a troubled woman who gets him a job working in a veterinary clinic Her involvement with a no-good carny worker brings him trouble and the attention of her guardian a former cop who thinks he recognizes Kimble

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Stern religious people lease a Barkley farm When townspeople discover the newcomers are Mormons who practice plural marriage they plan to drive them out Jarrod hides the truth as he attempts to mediate the situation

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne brings a body into town killed in a strange way The townspeople suspect Cheyenne is part of a rustler gang While Cheyenne is hunting for the killer a girls jealous boyfriend is hunting Cheyenne thinking he killed his brother

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Dawn of the Dead
programme.desc: During an escalating zombie epidemic two Philadelphia SWAT team members a traffic reporter and his TV executive girlfriend seek refuge in a secluded shopping mall

programme.title: Prophecy
programme.desc: A government health inspector is dispatched to assess the damage a logging company is causing to a patch of forest claimed by Native Americans and comes face to face with true terror wreaking havoc in the woods

programme.title: Cheerleader Camp
programme.desc: A cheerleader Betsy Russell her boyfriend Leif Garrett colleagues and a team mascot Lucinda Dickey attend a competition spoiled by murder

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: An Englishman with a grudge against an insurance company for a disallowed claim fakes his own death but is soon pursued by an insurance investigator

programme.desc: Trouble arises when 12 men realize that only eight of them can escape from the sinking submarine that has collided with a mine left over from the war

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss blackmails King Phineas into luring Jayce with an image of his father to a planet where Saw Boss is ready to destroy him Saw Boss makes good his threat to pull the Vortex Plug which would allow the atmosphere of the upper level

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Pride intercepts a message to Saw Boss declaring the Planet Kyros deadly to Monster Minds A weapon there turns everything to crystal Jayce leads everyone to the planet to find this weapon; but upon landing he discovers it is a trap

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM uses mutated vines to overgrow Los Angeles in order to force California officials to pay a hefty ransom MASK must find an antidote for the seemingly unstoppable plants to foil Mayhems plan

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: A lost Inca priest frozen in ice awakens with knowledge of El Dorado a city of gold hidden in the Andes mountains VENOM promptly kidnaps the priest and his god T-Bob to find the treasure MASK then attempts a daring rescue

programme.desc: The D-Boy File

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While the N team tries to get Simons memory back Mother Brain gets King Hippo and Eggplant Wizard to brainwash him into thinking hes an N-Team hunter Later Simon believes he is Donkey Kong Jr

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Lana Simon and Duke go to the Mirror World to rescue the princess father King Charles In the mean time their opposites are on a journey to their world

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The city of Turad is ruled by a demon queen According to an old prophecy she will be defeated only by a child of a stargazer The team is trying to fulfill the prophecy but for them to succeed Diana will have to make a hard choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Eric carelessly opens a magic box thereby summoning the Ultimate Evil which threatens to destroy everything Even Dungeon Master is no match for it

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw causes dairy cows to stop producing milk so people will have to buy products from his store

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget travels to the Greek island of Thermos to stop MAD from stealing a secret formula that will transform lead into gold

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Nick and Scooter are stranded on an alien prehistoric planet

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill has Braxis create a weapon that can induce stars to go nova roasting all their planets and the Guardians must stop him before he can use it on the Sun
